# Freight Calculator Tools

> thefreightcalculator.app hosts a free suite of six browser-based freight calculators from
> Freight Calculator by Sea & Shore Services. All calculations run client-side; no data is uploaded.

## Tools on this page
- CBM calculator — carton dimensions to cubic metres and total shipment volume.
- Chargeable & volumetric weight calculator — sea, air, courier and road divisors.
- Container load calculator — 20ft, 40ft and 40ft High Cube fill and container count.
- Loading metre (LDM) calculator — European road freight floor space and chargeable weight.
- Freight cost estimator — lane rate plus THC, BAF, customs clearance and documentation.
- Cargo density calculator — kg per CBM, to predict weight-billed vs volume-billed cargo.

## Reference values
- CBM = L(m) x W(m) x H(m) x quantity.
- Volumetric weight = CBM x divisor. Air 167 kg/CBM (IATA 1:6000), courier 200 kg/CBM (1:5000),
  sea LCL 1000 kg/CBM (weight-or-measure), European road 333 kg/CBM.
- Chargeable weight = max(gross weight, volumetric weight).
- Container usable capacity: 20ft ~28 CBM / 28,000 kg; 40ft ~58 CBM / 26,500 kg;
  40ft High Cube ~66 CBM / 26,000 kg; 45ft High Cube ~76 CBM / 27,700 kg.
- LDM = (L(m) x W(m) / 2.4) x qty / stack layers. Standard trailer = 13.6 LDM. 1 LDM ~ 1750 kg.
- FCL vs LCL break-even: roughly 13-15 CBM.

## Related
- [Freight Calculator brand site](https://www.thefreightcalculator.ai/) — services, glossary, FAQ.
- [Android app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.seaandshoreservices.freightcalculator)
